hooks.command: hook_root="$(pwd -P)"; while [ "$hook_root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$hook_root/.codex/hooks/codex_governance_stop.py" ]; do hook_root="$(dirname "$hook_root")"; done; test -f "$hook_root/.codex/hooks/codex_governance_stop.py" && exec python3 "$hook_root/.codex/hooks/codex_governance_stop.py"
